title: PinIt
body:
_"Crap, I can't remember where I found that cool mountain"_
- You, before PinIt

Never again will you forget cool locations.
Never again will you wander your server looking for a farm.
Never again will you have to bug your afk friend on Discord to find out where their base is so that you can "leave them a gift".

**PinIt is here to save the day!**

Your brain is for thinking, not remembering. Think about it, the amount of stuff you've forgotten will always vastly outnumber the amount of stuff you remember. So stop wasting that brain space with Minecraft coordinates.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lIEL-MQNoro" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

For additional setup info (the config is fairly thorough), see the Readme on [GitHub](https://github.com/fingerguns83/pinit)

Please direct bug reports to the issues tab on GitHub as well. Thanks!
